name: standards-refresh.sh path-prefix crawl skips links outside the seed's path prefix and their rules never reach the YAML
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r33-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/docs/api $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/docs/api/index.html <<'HTML'

API

Use the stable API surface

Consumers must depend only on documented stable interfaces.

outside HTML cat > $OUT/docs/outside.html <<'HTML'

Outside

Off prefix escape hatch rule

This page is outside the crawl prefix and must not contribute rules.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/out/node/r33-src.yaml; M=$(ls "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/crawls/"r33-src-*.jsonl | head -1); [ -f $T ] && grep -q 'outside-prefix' "$M" && ! grep -q 'off-prefix-escape-hatch-rule' $T && echo outside-prefix-links-skipped 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
